scripts.build: cd kpanda/gatewayapi && npm install && npm run build && cd ../../leopard/pitstop && npm install && npm run build && cd ../../insight/alert_routing && npm install && npm run build && cd ../../portal && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/prototypes/gatewayapi && mkdir -p dist/prototypes/gpu_ipavo && mkdir -p dist/prototypes/alert_routing && mkdir -p dist/prototypes/pitstop && cp -r portal/dist/* dist/ && cp -r kpanda/gatewayapi/dist/* dist/prototypes/gatewayapi/ && cp -r insight/gpu_ipavo/* dist/prototypes/gpu_ipavo/ && cp -r insight/alert_routing/dist/* dist/prototypes/alert_routing/ && cp -r leopard/pitstop/dist/* dist/prototypes/pitstop/
